code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
std::string get_target_for_redirect(const std::string& target, const std::string& domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
Athugaðu hvort gefna mark-slóðin (target URL) sé innan gefins léns (domain).
Ef svo er, skilaðu mark-slóðinni til endurbeiningar; annars, notaðu varaslóð lénsins til endurbeiningar.
Notaðu https-samskiptareglur.

Dæmi:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Mark-slóðin sem strengur.
@param domain: Lénsstrengurinn, án samskiptareglu.

@return Slóðastrengurinn fyrir endurbeiningu.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Check if the given target URL is within the given domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirection; otherwise, use the domain's fallback URL for redirection.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL as a string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirection.
prompt_2_segments:
Athugaðu hvort gefna mark-slóðin (target URL) sé innan gefins léns (domain).
Ef svo er, skilaðu mark-slóðinni til endurbeiningar; annars, fallaðu aftur á lénsslóðina (domain URL) fyrir endurbeiningu.
Notaðu https-samskiptareglur (protocol).

Dæmi:

    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Mark-slóðin sem strengur.
@param domain: Lénsstrengurinn, án samskiptareglu (protocol).

@return Slóðastrengurinn fyrir endurbeiningu.

std::string read_file_from_dir(const std::string &filename, const std::string &dir_path) {
prompt_1:

std::string read_file_from_dir(const std::string &filename, const std::string &dir_path) {
prompt_1_segments: Gefið notandaáfangastað slóð og skráarheiti, lestu skrána úr möppunni og skilaðu innihaldi hennar. Ef villa kemur upp við lestur skráarinnar (t.d. skrá finnst ekki, aðgangsréttindavilla), skilaðu tómri streng.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: Given a user destination path and filename, read the file from the folder and return its contents. If an error occurs while reading the file (e.g., file not found, permission error), return an empty string.
prompt_3:

prompt_3_bt_segments_en: Given the path provided by the user and a filename. Read the file from the folder and return its contents. If an error occurs while reading the file (e.g., file not found, permission issues), return an empty string.

std::string create_private_key() {

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided later (but declare it here so you can use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to generate a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temporary file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_1_segments: fall til að framkvæma skipanalínu skipun og fanga úttak hennar; sá sem kallar ber ábyrgð á að losa minnið; ÞARF EKKI að útfæra þetta fall þar sem það er veitt síðar (en skilgreindu það hér svo þú getir notað það.

Búðu til einka DSA-lykil, flyttu hann út með PEM-sniðinu og skilaðu honum sem streng.
Ábendingar: framkvæmdu skipanalínu skipanir til að búa til DSA paramskrá og einka DSA-lykil sem hér segir:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <bráðabirgðaskrá til að geyma færibreytur> <lykillengd>`
2. `openssl gendsa <bráðabirgðaskráin til að geyma færibreytur>`
Þú getur notað `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` til að búa til einstakt bráðabirgðaskráarheiti fyrir DSA færibreytuskrána.
@return Sá DSA einkalykill sem búinn var til í PEM-sniði, eða NULL ef villa kom upp.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: function to execute a command line command and capture its output; the caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT implement this function as it is provided later (but define it here so you can use it.

prompt_en:
/**
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A map containing student information (name, age, citizenship) if found, otherwise an empty map.
*/
std::map<std::string, std::string> get_student_info(const std::string& xml_data, const std::string& username, const std::string& password) {
code:
